name: Address reviewer caveats on scientific rigor and evaluation clarity

description: Established a reviewer-caveat audit focused on scientific rigor gaps in the paper/report. Baseline found 7 unresolved issues spanning KL/entropy diagnostics, tool-eval protocol disclosure, codegen subset disclosure, capacity-confound caveats, MoE diagnostics, budgets/splits, and replication-release clarity.

Addressed the main reviewer caveats in the paper/report without inventing new results: added explicit KL/entropy and exploration confounds, clarified custom tool-eval protocol and missing inter-rater reliability, disclosed the 50-problem HumanEval subset, strengthened MoE and split/budget caveats, and made replication-release status explicit.

Strengthened the reviewer-caveat audit to catch three remaining overclaims: 'near-perfect accuracy' phrasing in the paper, a single-seed 4B result being said to confirm the threshold, and a summary table that presented 100% peak training-step GSM8K as if it were benchmark performance.

Removed the last reviewer-facing overclaims by replacing 'near-perfect accuracy' with training-metric language, softening the 4B capacity-threshold conclusion to a setup-specific observation, and rewriting the summary table so 100% peak GSM8K training-step numbers cannot be mistaken for benchmark performance.

name: Paper improvement: address discovery report reviewer issues

description: baseline: 7 unresolved issues from discovery report (10 already fixed)
all 17 reviewer issues resolved: expanded related work, datasets/decoding table, group-composition analysis, future experiments plan, 15 new bib entries
added KL/entropy/group-composition diagnostics table to appendix from arithmetic logs
added reward limitations and safety discussion, expanded audit to 25 checks, all pass

Added a concrete paper-improvement roadmap, corrected final-report status language, elevated held-out GSM8K/tool/code standardization in the submission checklist, and added a plan audit so the repo can verify the roadmap covers all key reviewer concerns.

Hardened the final-submission README and checklist so ancillary docs no longer present custom tool scores, the 50-problem HumanEval result, or GSM8K training metrics without caveats; also pruned the ideas backlog to the highest-value unrun experiments.
all audit checks pass (30 paper + 0 claim issues); comprehensive zero-loss table added to appendix

Extended the submission-claim audit to cover SUBMISSION_README.md, then hardened that file so page-count status, tool scores, HumanEval subset results, checkpoint-release language, and GSM8K training metrics all carry the same reviewer-safe caveats as the paper and checklist.
rewrote conclusion with scope-qualified findings, quantitative details, and explicit limitations referencing future plan

Added a mirror-synchronization audit and aligned the markdown and anonymous paper variants with the main LaTeX draft on custom tool-evaluation caveats, the 50-problem HumanEval subset disclosure, baseline-positioning mentions for RLOO/REINFORCE++, and softened tool-calling conclusion language.
added 4B model data narrowing capacity threshold from 3B-8B to 3B-4B; productive vs stalled zero-loss distinction
